existingTestUpdates.change: Update maxTopologyInstances from {low:3, high:10} to {low:1, high:3} to match new hero-scale instance counts
Update maxTopologyInstances from 15 to 3 (new cap); keep maxConnections:10 test
existingTestUpdates.oldSnippet: const constellation = createConstellationLines({ maxTopologyInstances: 15, maxConnections: 10, seed: 'test-32' });
existingTestUpdates.newSnippet: const constellation = createConstellationLines({ maxTopologyInstances: 3, maxConnections: 10, seed: 'test-32' });

existingTestUpdates.change: Update maxTopologyInstances from {low:3, high:15} to {low:1, high:3}

newTests.description: High-tier config produces at most 3 topology instances
acceptanceCriteria: Constellation topology system (US-069) is reworked: instance count drops dramatically (1-3 large hero topologies, not a field of small ones)

newTests.description: Instances do not overlap — all instance centers are at least MIN_SEPARATION apart
acceptanceCriteria: Instances do not overlap in screen space (seeded positions enforce minimum separation)
Each remaining topology instance is significantly larger and centered with clear silhouette

newTests.description: Topology selection favours icosahedron/octahedron over tetrahedron
acceptanceCriteria: Edge count per instance is reduced if a topology produces dense crossing lines (prefer icosahedron/octahedron over dual/compound forms here)

newTests.description: Visual is recognizably a small number of clean geometric solids (vertex count consistent with 1-3 polyhedra)
acceptanceCriteria: Visual is recognizably a small number of clean geometric solids, not a tangled web

newTests.description: No console errors with new reduced instance configuration
acceptanceCriteria: No console errors; quality tiers still respected

testFiles.describeBlock: US-071: Fix cluttered multi-polyhedra constellation scene
